name: markdown-campaign-validator
description: Validate campaign packet completeness in Markdown-only repos.

# Markdown Campaign Validator

## Required files

```text
00_campaign_brief.md
01_buyer_state.md
02_math_model_selection.md
03_hypotheses.md
04_creative_variants.md
05_proof_path.md
06_platform_packet.md
07_measurement_plan.md
08_posterior_updates.md
09_decision_log.md
10_learning_memo.md
11_memory_updates.md
```

## Pass

All required files exist and contain non-empty decisions.
